creator: 2igosha@gmail.com
text:
After csup-ing to the latest port revision and trying to build wine, the only thing I get is:

[root@igosha-desktop /usr/ports/emulators/wine]# make
===>  wine-1.1.17,1 builds, but fails upon startup.
*** Error code 1

I thought that the purpose of updating ports is to provide handy tools for building software, not just throwing out useless messages.

Fix: 

None known
How-To-Repeat: 1. csup to latest ports
2. cd /usr/ports/emulators/wine && make

The output is:

===>  wine-1.1.17,1 builds, but fails upon startup.
*** Error code 1
